**Problem statement**
What pain are you trying to solve?

**Proposed solution**
Describe the feature, ideally with UI/UX sketches or examples.

**Constraints respected** (tick all that apply)
- [ ] Stays single-file (or layered enterprise file) — no build step
- [ ] No server / no backend
- [ ] No AI API calls
- [ ] Works offline after first load

**Alternatives considered**

**Additional context**
